entity.label: Nezib
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town in the “plain” of Judah. It has been identified with Beit Nuzib, about 14 miles south-west of Jerusalem, in the Wady Sur (Josh. 15:43).

nodes.label: Nezib
nodes.description: A town in the “plain” of Judah. It has been identified with Beit Nuzib, about 14 miles south-west of Jerusalem, in the Wady Sur (Josh. 15:43).

verses.text: And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
